Container.Name: resonite-headless
Container.Overview:
Resonite headless server (successor to Neos). Uses SteamCMD inside the image to download and run the headless client.
ATTENTION: First startup may take a while while it downloads the headless files.
Update Notice: Restart the container to pick up a newer headless build.
Image: shadowpanther/resonite-headless (same author lineage as the old Neos headless image).
Container.DonateText: If you feel like helping me out, it's appreciated!
Container.Requires:
[ ! --- READ ME --- ! ]
Access: Headless requires Resonite supporter access (Discoverer tier and above). In Resonite, message the Resonite bot with /headlessCode to get the beta password for STEAMBETAPASSWORD.
https://wiki.resonite.com/Headless_server_software
Steam: Use a dedicated Steam account. Steam Guard off is recommended for unattended Docker updates (see wiki).
Config: Create Config.json and place it in the Config path below (capital C). Example config and Docker notes: https://github.com/shadowpanther/resonite-headless https://wiki.resonite.com/Headless_server_software/Configuration_File
Host tip: If you see frequent GC crashes, set on the Unraid host: vm.max_map_count=262144 (e.g. echo "vm.max_map_count=262144" >> /etc/sysctl.conf && sysctl -p)
No inbound game ports required for typical headless use (session hosting is not classic port-forward listen).

Config.Name: Resonite Data
Config.Description: Persistent headless install / data directory inside the container.

Config.Name: Config File Location
Config.Description: Host folder for Config.json (read-only mount). Put Config.json here before first start.

Config.Name: Steam Login Username and Password
Config.Description: Format: USERNAME PASSWORD (space between). Required so SteamCMD can download/update the headless. Dedicated alt account recommended; Steam Guard off for unattended use.

Config.Name: Steam Beta Password
Config.Description: Headless beta access code. In Resonite, message the Resonite bot: /headlessCode

Config.Name: Steam Beta Version
Config.Description: Stable headless: headless. For prerelease/.NET 10 testing use prerelease and clear STEAMBETAPASSWORD; set DOTNETVERSION to 10.0 (see advanced).

Config.Name: DOTNETVERSION
Config.Description: Optional. Leave blank for default image runtime. Set to 10.0 when using STEAMBETA=prerelease (.NET 10 headless).

Config.Name: Host Local Time
Config.Description: Inject host timezone into the container (read-only).
